description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it will look great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Suede leather thong style straps with nubuck lining and silver stud decoration Leather toe separator Elasticated striped strap over midfoot Nubuck and patent leather footbed for comfort and durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with wave shaped lugs for absolute grip and traction Stitch detail along side of outsole Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
